name: Live+ Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Food, Dining, Grocery, Shopping, and Utility spends

domestic: 2 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits per year from 26 July 2026, based on reported HSBC cardholder communication.
international: 1 complimentary international airport lounge visit per year from 1 September 2026, based on reported HSBC cardholder communication.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: ₹1,000 cashback after logging into the HSBC India app and spending ₹20,000 within the first 30 days
Voucher worth up to ₹750 for Amazon Pay, Zomato, and Swiggy on card activation with a single transaction of ₹300 or more

joiningBenefits: ₹1,000 cashback after logging into the HSBC India app and spending ₹20,000 within the first 30 days
Voucher worth up to ₹750 for Amazon Pay, Zomato, and Swiggy on card activation with a single transaction of ₹300 or more
additionalBenefits: Visa Infinite privileges including airport meet-and-assist services, complimentary ITC hotel stay benefits, and Avis car rental benefits, subject to terms
₹250 quarterly cashback on eligible contactless fuel spends after ₹10,000 quarterly contactless fuel spend
District by Zomato dining and movie offers, subject to terms
Reported upgrade to Visa Infinite benefits effective 26 July 2026
additionalDetails: Cashback is credited as statement credit within 45 days of the statement date
Qualified annual spend of ₹2 Lakhs waives the renewal fee of ₹999

salaried: Minimum monthly income of ₹50,000 (₹6 Lakhs per annum)
Reside in an eligible service city listed by HSBC
selfEmployed: Reside in an eligible service city listed by HSBC

internalNotes: Official HSBC Live+ page rechecked on 2026-07-10 after the 2026 upgrade video source. HSBC's public page still listed 10% cashback on dining, food delivery, and grocery spends up to ₹1,000 per month, 1.5% unlimited cashback on most other spends, 4 domestic lounge visits per year, and 3.5% forex markup, but did confirm the activation voucher is now worth up to ₹750.

Structured reward, lounge, forex, tag, exclusion, and benefit fields were updated on 2026-07-10 per user direction using public reports from Paisabazaar, SaveSage, CreditKeeda, DesiDime and TechnoFino, along with the 2026-07-03 YouTube transcript. These sources say HSBC cardholder communication announced future Live+ changes effective 2026-07-26: Visa Infinite upgrade, 10% cashback extended to eligible shopping and utilities, 10% cashback cap raised to ₹1,200/month, ₹250 quarterly cashback on eligible contactless fuel spends, reduced 1.99% forex markup, 1 international lounge visit per year from 2026-09-01, reduced domestic lounge access, and removal of 1.5% cashback for international, hospital and local-transport spends. HSBC's public product page and Live+ service guide had not yet reflected these future terms when rechecked on 2026-07-10, so verificationStatus is needs-review until HSBC publishes updated public terms.
Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
10% cashback on food, dining, groceries, shopping, and utility spends is reported to be capped at ₹1,200 per month combined from 26 July 2026.
Amazon, Flipkart, and Myntra spends are reported to remain eligible for 1.5% cashback rather than the 10% shopping cashback rate.
Excludes rent, insurance, government, education, wallet loads, gold, EMI, international, hospital, and local transportation transactions from earning base cashback under the reported future terms.
